title: rosa obtusifolia var. tomentella
intro: Rosa obtusifolia var. tomentella, also known as the hairy rose, is a variety of rose that is native to Asia and is prized for its medicinal properties. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa obtusifolia var. tomentella include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Rosa obtusifolia var. tomentella can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its petals can also be used in herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to promote wound healing and skin health.
